title: CASA Technical SME
description:
Key Responsibilities

Technical Leadership

·       Define and review the technical strategy and architecture for the CASA platform implementation, ensuring enterprise architecture, IT standards and business objectives.

·       Provide hands-on technical guidance to development teams, ensuring adherence to best practices in coding, integration, and system design.

·       Establish and enforce technical governance, ensuring compliance with security, scalability, and performance requirements.

Solution Design, Development and Integration

·       Lead the design, development and delivery of CASA related applications and ensuring seamless integration with vendor solutions like Oracle FLEXCUBE with bank’s core and downstream systems like Payments / Trade Finance / Lending / Markets.

·       Integrate with third-party CASA systems and regulatory systems

·       Support system migration, ensuring minimal disruption and data integrity during transitional phases.

·       Design and build APIs for CASA integration touch points and various CASA related services

·       Utilize and manage cloud platforms (eg. Azure, AWS) for hosting and operating CASA systems.

·       Collaborate with vendors, internal IT teams, and stakeholders to provide the solution and troubleshoot issues

Risk and Quality Management

·       Identify and mitigate technical risks throughout the project lifecycle, ensuring high-quality deliverables that meet business and regulatory requirements.

·       Conduct configuration reviews, performance tuning to ensure robust and scalable solutions.

·       Drive automation and technology best practices to enhance delivery speed, system resilience, and operational efficiency.

Stakeholder and Vendor Management

·       Work closely with business stakeholders, IT teams, and vendors to ensure alignment between technical and business objectives.

·       Act as the primary technical liaison between internal teams and platform vendors, ensuring smooth integration and issue resolution.

·       Provide technical insights and updates to senior management, supporting strategic decision-making and project governance.

Continuous Improvement

·       Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends, driving innovation in technology and core banking systems.

·       Document best practices, technical standards, and lessons learned to support future implementations and organizational knowledge sharing.

Key Skills and Qualifications

·       Education:

o   Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

·       Certifications:

o   Any cloud certifications could be added advantage (AWS or Azure)

o   SWIFT Certifications if any, for instance, ISO 20022, could be value add.

o   TOGAF or other relevant architecture certifications are a plus.

·       ISO 20022 Knowledge:

o   ISO 20022 knowledge on the message formats for SWIFT

o   Hands on experience working with both MT and MX message details and nuances


Years of Experience

·       20+/15+ years of experience in technical roles, including solution design, integration, and implementation.

·       15+/10+ years of experience working on CASA Systems (Experience in working with Oracle FLEXCUBE DDA will be added advantage)

·       Experience on Payments / Trade Finance / Lending / Markets would be added advantage

postedCompany.description: The Company's principal activity is manpower contracting services with other information technology and computer services.
postedCompany.name: EXCELTECH COMPUTERS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
